title: On Behalf of H.E. the Egyptian President, Prime Minister Witnesses the Signing of the MoU Between SCZONE and Tokyo Metropolitan Government on Green Hydrogen Cooperation
content: On behalf of His Excellency President Abdel Fattah El Sisi, Prime Minister Mostafa Madbouly witnessed the signing of a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) on green hydrogen cooperation between the Suez Canal Economic Zone (SCZONE) and the Bureau of Industrial and Labor Affairs of the Tokyo Metropolitan Government. The signing ceremony was held in the presence of Tokyo Governor Yuriko Koike. SCZONE Chairman Mr. Waleid Gamal El-Dien and Mr. TANAKA Shin-ichi, Director General of the Bureau of Industrial and Labor Affairs, signed the MOU.
author: Analysts Account
